In a rice net or large strainer, rinse the rice until clear.  Should be ~3 rinses depending on crop and starch levels.
Replace rice, drained, to rice cookers lined with rice nets.  Add oil and water and loosely cover the top with the nets.
Cook in Zojirushi rice cookers (automatic cooking timer) for ~45 minutes or until changed from "Cook" to "Warm"
Remove rice from cooker and spread on sheet trays to cool to room temp.
Once all steam has left, reserve in blast chiller to finish cooling.
Once fully cooled, reserve in hotel pans in the cooler.
